anchor: blind human (annotate.html), in-distribution test, seed 0 n 36

disagreements_adjudicated.resolution: GOLD CORRECT — among rows passing 2018>=195.9 (Americas, EMEA, total), Americas (273.6) is the lowest 2019; EMEA (413) is not. Human slip, confirmed by annotator.

conclusion: On the two natural question types the gold is corroborated by an independent blind human: 0 gold errors (22 direct agreements + 2 disagreements both adjudicated to human slips). tradeoff_summary NOT human-validated (technical term the non-specialist annotator could not assess; 12/12 flagged 'I don't know') -> independent validation of tradeoff rests on the LLM anchor (12/12).
